title: My Daughter Stole My 40% Stake And Forced Me Out With A $12K Check. So I Took Her Secret Store.
description: After I poured my entire $210,000 401(k) into my daughter's hardware store for a 40% stake, the business exploded to $1.2M. Then she and her husband forged a stock certificate showing I owned only 5%, forced me out with a $12,000 check, and secretly stocked a second location. I proved the fraud, took the second store in settlement, and now undercut their prices by 15%, driving their flagship into Chapter 11. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #Karma
thumb_text: I TOOK THE STORE SHE NEVER KNEW I FOUND.

thumb_lines.text: MY 401K SAVED HER STORE, THEN SHE STOLE IT
